headline: Here’s What UBS Has to Say About ​Corning Incorporated (GLW)
summary: ​Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) is one of the Unstoppable Technology Stocks to Buy Now. On March 19, UBS reiterated a Buy rating on Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) with a price target of $171. ​UBS maintained its bullish sentiment on the stock after attending the Optical Fiber Communications conference, where the firm met with fiber producers, sellers, and […]

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Corning (GLW) After Its Strong Share Price Rally?
summary: Wondering whether Corning at US$148.52 is still attractive or already pricing in a lot of optimism? This article walks you through what that price might be implying about the company. Over the last week Corning returned 9.2%, with 20.5% over 30 days, 63.8% year to date and 284.8% over the past year, alongside 358.5% over three years and 277.1% over five years. Those moves naturally raise questions about how much upside or risk is now baked into the stock. Recent coverage has focused on...
